tasks.title: ZAZZ-1: Foundation completed (schema + API read paths)
ZAZZ-1: Remaining work (UI polish + edge cases)
ZAZZ-3: Reproduce bug and capture failing cases
ZAZZ-3: Add regression tests for invalid tag formats
ZAZZ-3: Confirm API validation contract + error messaging
ZAZZ-3: Fix validation for trailing hyphen and edge cases
ZAZZ-3: Add server-side canonicalization (lowercase + hyphens)
ZAZZ-3: Ensure tag creation/upsert handles collisions
ZAZZ-3: QA run (API + UI) for tag flows
ZAZZ-3: Address review feedback / small refactor
ZAZZ-3: Final sign-off checklist
CODEX 1.1: Test Harness Cleanup for Image Routes
tasks.prompt: Goal: update API test helpers so image tables are cleaned per test and image route tests are isolated. Include helper updates in api/__tests__/helpers/testDatabase.js and ensure no cross-test image state bleed. Acceptance: image fixtures can be created/deleted repeatedly in tests without leakage.

tasks.title: CODEX 1.2: Remove Project-Wide Graph Endpoint + Add Scoping Tests
tasks.prompt: Goal: remove GET /projects/:code/graph route and schema, keep deliverable graph route intact, and add dedicated route tests proving removed path is 404 and deliverable path still works. Acceptance: task-graph-scoping tests pass.

tasks.title: CODEX 1.3: Deliverable-Only Graph UI (No Null Fetch)
tasks.prompt: Goal: remove project-wide graph mode in client. Update App selector to deliverables-only, update useTaskGraph to skip fetch when deliverableId is null, and show explicit prompt in TaskGraphPage before selection. Acceptance: no /projects/{code}/graph fetch path remains in UI.

tasks.title: CODEX 2.1: IMAGE_METADATA Single-Owner Schema Constraint
tasks.prompt: Goal: update schema so IMAGE_METADATA supports task or deliverable ownership (task_id nullable, add deliverable_id nullable FK) with DB-level XOR constraint (exactly one owner set). Acceptance: schema enforces both-set and neither-set failures.

tasks.title: CODEX 2.2: Refactor Image Service for Project/Owner Validation
tasks.prompt: Refactor databaseService image operations to support both task-owned and deliverable-owned images with project-scope ownership checks and scoped URL handling.

tasks.title: CODEX 2.3: Replace Legacy Image Routes with Scoped Contracts
tasks.prompt: Replace legacy /tasks/:taskId/images and /images/:id routes with project+deliverable scoped task routes, deliverable image routes, and project-scoped image fetch/metadata routes.

tasks.title: CODEX 2.4: Align API Metadata Text for Scoped Image Contract
tasks.prompt: Update API root endpoint summaries/tag descriptions so docs no longer imply legacy global image routes and reflect project-scoped image operations.

tasks.title: CODEX 3.1: Add Image Scoping Integration Tests
tasks.prompt: Add Pactum tests for scoped task/deliverable image routes, project-scoped image fetch/metadata, 401/403/404 behavior, legacy route 404s, and single-owner DB constraint checks.

tasks.title: CODEX 3.2: Regression Tests for Unchanged Project-ID Routes
tasks.prompt: Add regression tests for /projects/:id, /projects/:id/kanban/tasks/column/:status, and /projects/:id/tasks to ensure these accepted id-based routes remain unchanged.

tasks.title: CODEX 3.3: Finalize Graph Removal Regression Tests
tasks.prompt: Finalize task-graph scoping regression tests for removed project graph endpoint and preserved deliverable graph behavior.

tasks.title: CODEX 3.4: Harden OpenAPI Assertions for Graph/Image Contract
tasks.prompt: Update openapi.test.mjs to assert removed /projects/{code}/graph and legacy image paths, and assert presence/shape of all new scoped image paths.

tasks.title: CODEX 3.5: Update API Skill Docs + Final Verification
tasks.prompt: Update zazz-board-api skill/docs to new route contract, run final QA verification, and prepare commit-ready summary.

tasks.title: CODEX 4.1: Replace drizzle-orm symlink workaround
tasks.prompt: Replace manual node_modules symlink workaround with a worktree-safe dependency solution and update setup/troubleshooting docs.

tasks.title: CODEX 4.2: Persist Task Graph deliverable selection
tasks.prompt: Persist the last selected deliverable for Task Graph per project. On reload, restore the saved deliverable if it still exists. Keep deliverable-only graph selector behavior.

tasks.title: CODEX 4.3: Harden Task Graph selection restore timing
tasks.prompt: Make Task Graph deliverable persistence deterministic across reload/project hydration timing by hydrating selection on project change and validating against current deliverables.

tasks.title: CODEX 4.4: Keep completed tasks visible with green outline
tasks.prompt: Ensure completed tasks are never treated as non-complete by graph styling logic. COMPLETED/DONE must always render with green outline.

tasks.title: CODEX 4.5: Make API skill lifecycle rules explicit
tasks.prompt: Update zazz-board-api skill to require explicit task status transitions, explicit deliverable status updates, and explicit DEPENDS_ON relation creation/verification.

tasks.title: CODEX 5.1: Add SSE stream + status/relation event emits
tasks.prompt: Implement project-scoped SSE endpoint and emit realtime events for task status/position/create/delete, deliverable status changes, and relation (DEPENDS_ON) updates.

tasks.title: CODEX 5.2: Wire UI realtime subscriptions for Kanban + Graph
tasks.prompt: Add client SSE subscription hook and use it to refresh Task Kanban columns, Task Graph node styling/edges, and Deliverable Kanban status colors immediately across clients.

tasks.title: CODEX 5.3: Add SSE integration tests + regression checks
tasks.prompt: Add API integration tests validating SSE events for task status changes, deliverable status changes, and DEPENDS_ON relation updates; run focused regression suite.

tasks.title: Audit routes for project filter
tasks.prompt: Read the route information and discuss discover which routes do not filter by project.
